title: Excalibur | Shield Expansion Support
description: Excalibur support for the mod "Shield Expansion".
body:
# Excalibur | Shield Expansion Support
This is an unofficial [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack for the mod [Shield Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-expansion). All textures have been edited to best fit within the Excalibur style.

Note: The Netherite Shield uses the old excalibur netherite palatte. You may want to use an older version of Excalibur, but I recommend using the latest version and manually adding the old netherite textures ontop.
## Credits
- [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - Excalibur Author
- [InfernalStudios](https://modrinth.com/user/InfernalStudios) - Shield Expansion Author
